ddls:
CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the auction item */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the seller of the item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "starting_price" REAL /* Starting price of the auction */,
  "current_high_bid" REAL /* Current highest bid on the item */,
  "closing_time" TEXT /* Time when the auction closes */,
  "bidding_increment" REAL /* The minimum increment for each bid */,
  "reserve_price" REAL /* The minimum price the seller is willing to accept */,
  "automatic_bidding" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if automatic bidding is allowed */,
  "item_image" TEXT /* URL or path to the item's image */,
  "item_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the item (e.g., new, used, vintage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES sellers ("seller_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sellers" (
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seller */,
  "seller_name" TEXT /* Name of the seller */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the seller */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the seller */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date when the seller registered on the platform */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the seller */,
  "num_items_listed" INTEGER /* Number of items currently listed by the seller */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total revenue generated by the seller from auctions */,
  "seller_type" TEXT /* Type of seller (e.g., individual, business) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "category_image" TEXT /* URL or path to the category image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bids" (
  "bid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bid */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item being bid on */,
  "bidder_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bidder placing the bid */,
  "bid_amount" REAL /* Amount of the bid */,
  "bid_time" TEXT /* Time when the bid was placed */,
  "bid_status" TEXT /* Status of the bid (e.g., active, outbid, won) */,
  "bid_increment" REAL /* The amount by which the bid increased the previous bid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bids_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bids_bidder_id FOREIGN KEY ("bidder_id") REFERENCES bidders ("bidder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bidders" (
  "bidder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bidder */,
  "bidder_name" TEXT /* Name of the bidder */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the bidder */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the bidder registered on the platform */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the bidder */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the bidder */,
  "num_bids" INTEGER /* Total number of bids placed by the bidder */,
  "total_winnings" REAL /* Total amount won from auctions by the bidder */,
  "bidder_type" TEXT /* Type of bidder (e.g., individual, business) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bidder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was created */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., bid, auction, promotion) */,
  "notification_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the notification was sent (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_records" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "bidder_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bidder making the payment */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item for which payment is made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount paid for the item */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the transaction */,
  "payment_gateway" TEXT /* Payment gateway used (e.g., Stripe, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_records_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_records_bidder_id FOREIGN KEY ("bidder_id") REFERENCES bidders ("bidder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reviewer */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the seller being reviewed */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item being reviewed */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the reviewer */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided in the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of review (e.g., item, seller) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES bidders ("bidder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES sellers ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "auction_types" (
  "auction_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each auction type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the auction type (e.g., Timed, Live) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the auction type */,
  "is_live" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the auction type is live */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Typical duration of the auction type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("auction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "auctions" (
  "auction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each auction */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item being auctioned */,
  "auction_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of auction */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the auction */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the auction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the auction (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "reserve_price" REAL /* The minimum price the seller is willing to accept */,
  "current_high_bid" REAL /* The current highest bid on the auction */,
  "bid_count" INTEGER /* The total number of bids placed on the auction */,
  "automatic_bidding" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if automatic bidding is allowed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("auction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auctions_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auctions_auction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("auction_type_id") REFERENCES auction_types ("auction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bidding_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bidding history record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item that received the bid */,
  "bidder_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bidder who placed the bid */,
  "bid_amount" REAL /* Amount of the bid */,
  "bid_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the bid was placed */,
  "bid_status" TEXT /* Status of the bid (e.g., active, outbid, won) */,
  "bid_increment" REAL /* The amount by which the bid increased the previous bid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bidding_history_bidder_id FOREIGN KEY ("bidder_id") REFERENCES bidders ("bidder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bidding_history_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., bidder, seller) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the user */,
  "num_auctions" INTEGER /* Total number of auctions the user has participated in */,
  "total_transactions" INTEGER /* Total number of transactions (bids, listings) the user has made */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended, banned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the action was performed */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., bid, list, review) */,
  "action_status" TEXT /* Status of the action (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
